description_long: This is a modern, horizontal slat fence constructed primarily from light-colored wood, supported by two sturdy vertical posts and capped with decorative post caps. The fence features evenly spaced horizontal wooden slats that provide partial visibility and airflow while maintaining privacy. The base of the fence is reinforced with a concrete or stone plinth, adding stability and a contrasting texture. The top edge of the fence is flat, with the posts extending slightly above the slats and topped with simple, pyramid-shaped caps. The overall design is clean and functional, suitable for urban or suburban environments such as backyards, parks, or property boundaries. There are no visible gates or decorative embellishments beyond the post caps.
description: A modern horizontal slat wooden fence with two posts, pyramid post caps, and a concrete base. The design is clean, flat-topped, and functional for privacy and boundary marking.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the narrow profile of the fence and the decorative post cap.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full width of the fence, horizontal slats, two posts, and the concrete base.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, mirroring view 0 with the same narrow profile and post cap.
description_view_3: Rear view of the fence, showing the horizontal slats and posts from the opposite side, with less visible slat spacing.
